content: The Self-Refine framework’s iterative self-feedback loop can be modified to incorporate the multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a multi-perspective self-refinement pipeline that outperforms single-perspective self-refinement without requiring extra training or supervised data. This hybrid approach resolves a key limitation of vanilla Self-Refine: it avoids getting stuck in local optima caused by the LLM’s consistent single-framework bias when generating feedback for its own output.
